data.title: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section and workflow-config-schema.json for usage-aware throttling
data.description:
## Description

Update project documentation to reflect the new usage-aware throttling system:

1. **CLAUDE.md architecture section**: Add description of check-usage.sh + agent-batch-lifecycle.sh throttle pipeline and the 3-tier protocol (unlimited/throttled/paused). Place near existing agent-batch-lifecycle.sh documentation.

2. **workflow-config-schema.json**: Add an orchestration section with max_agents property:
   - type: integer or null
   - default: null (no cap)
   - description: caps the upper bound on concurrent sub-agents

Note: dso-config.conf commented example is handled by task 52d4-21f4 under story 8b9f-c4bc.

### Unit test exemption justification
1. No conditional logic — documentation and schema updates
2. Tests are structural (grep for presence of schema keys) — acceptable for metadata/schema validation
3. Infrastructure-boundary-only — documentation files

## File Impact
- CLAUDE.md (modify — architecture section only)
- plugins/dso/docs/workflow-config-schema.json (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md architecture section mentions check-usage.sh throttle pipeline
  Verify: grep -q "check-usage.sh" CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md architecture section mentions 3-tier protocol
  Verify: grep -q "unlimited.*throttled.*paused\|3-tier\|MAX_AGENTS: unlimited" CLAUDE.md
- [ ] workflow-config-schema.json contains orchestration.max_agents property
  Verify: grep -q "max_agents" plugins/dso/docs/workflow-config-schema.json
- [ ] All existing tests still pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
